front: What are the principles of sustained-release ocular peptide delivery?
back: Ocular challenges: tear dilution, corneal barrier, rapid clearance. Sustained-release: intravitreal implants (Ozurdex - PLGA), punctal plugs, in situ gelling systems. Peptides: anti-VEGF (ranibizumab, aflibercept) for wet AMD. Port delivery systems enable refillable reservoirs.
